backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines an Enquiry type and exposes three functions: submitEnquiry (adds an enquiry to a list), getAllEnquiries (returns all enquiries as an array), and getEnquiry (returns a single enquiry by index).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI redesign features (AP logo polish, hero text contrast, overall design consistency) to their affected frontend files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key styling or functional details.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app titled 'Adarshpatel Marketing' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, DairyFeedSection, AgriInputsSection, CoffeeTradingSection, ContactSection, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AgriInputsSectio: Renders the Agri Inputs section with six product cards (fertilizers, seeds, pesticides, soil care) featuring category color badges, feature tags, and an Enquire Now button that smooth-scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/CoffeeTradingSec: Renders the Coffee Trading section on a dark coffee-brown background with four product cards for Arabica, Robusta, Plantation, and Roasted coffee, using amber OKLCH inline styles and a decorative dot-grid background pattern.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact and enquiry form section with validated fields (name, phone, product dropdown, message) wired to the backend submitEnquiry mutation, alongside a contact info panel showing phone numbers, address, and product categories.
frontend/src/components/DairyFeedSection: Renders a section showcasing six dairy feed products as cards with badges, descriptions, features, and an enquiry button that scrolls to the contact section or triggers a callback.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, and contact details (phone, email, address) in a four-column grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, layered gradients, AP logo badge, main heading, and CTA buttons to scroll to products or contact.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, a logo badge, and a responsive mobile menu toggle that changes style on scroll.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitEnquiry` mutation hook that calls the backend actor's `submitEnquiry` method and invalidates the enquiries query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, and defines an earthy agricultural OKLCH color palette with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom earthy/agricultural color tokens (earth, coffee, chart, sidebar), custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography and container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, existing features, and feature requests for the Adarshpatel Marketing site, specifically recording three completed design polish features around the hero logo, hero text contrast, and overall earthy palette consistency.
